ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction among household members */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain value associated with the interaction */,
  "fscore" REAL /* FScore metric for the interaction's effectiveness */,
  "wfscore" REAL /* Weighted FScore of the interaction */,
  "avg_wfscore" REAL /* Average weighted FScore across multiple instances */,
  "avg_gain" REAL /* Average gain calculated from the interaction */,
  "expected_gain" REAL /* Expected gain based on historical data */,
  "gain_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the gain value */,
  "fscore_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the FScore value */,
  "wfscore_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the weighted FScore value */,
  "avg_wfscore_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the average weighted FScore value */,
  "avg_gain_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the average gain value */,
  "expected_gain_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the expected gain value */,
  "average_rank" INTEGER /* Overall average rank for the interaction */,
  "avg_tree_index" REAL /* Average tree index indicating interaction complexity */,
  "avg_tree_depth" REAL /* Average tree depth for the interaction */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the household members involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "interaction_medium" TEXT /* Medium through which the interaction took place */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Context or setting of the interaction */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "interaction_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., housewife, spouse, househead) */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household the member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the household member */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the household member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the household member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the household member */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the household member */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the household member */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the household member */,
  "relationship_to_head" TEXT /* Relationship to the head of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the household */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the household (number of members) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level category of the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., nuclear, extended, single-parent) */,
  "household_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the household (e.g., apartment, house, shared living) */,
  "household_lifestyle" TEXT /* Lifestyle of the household (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "household_preferences" TEXT /* General preferences of the household (e.g., brand loyalty, eco-friendly) */,
  "household_purchasing_power" TEXT /* Purchasing power of the household */,
  "household_financial_goals" TEXT /* Financial goals of the household (e.g., saving, investing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction related to the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., cost, satisfaction) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., survey, interview, transaction) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the metric */,
  "metric_context" TEXT /* Context in which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decision_metrics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the platform */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction related to the recommendation */,
  "suggested_action" TEXT /* Suggested action for household members */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was generated */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the recommendation */,
  "recommended_to" INTEGER /* ID of the household or household member the recommendation is for */,
  "followed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the recommendation was followed */,
  "followed_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_to FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_to") REFERENCES household_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
